summary: The role of a Surgeon is fundamentally incompatible with your priorities, as it demands excessive, unpredictable hours and carries an extremely high risk of burnout. Furthermore, the required highly analytical thinking style—focusing on rapid-fire quantitative reasoning and complex deduction—directly conflicts with your strengths in protocol-driven work and your challenges with mathematics. Given the mandatory night shifts and high-stress environment, this profession would significantly compromise your personal wellbeing and long-term career sustainability.
